title: Kalyan Jewellers is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Kalyan Jewellers is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Kalyan Jewellers! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Kalyan Jewellers:
Kalyan Jewellers is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kalyan Jewellers!
